extraction_notes: Wikipedia source confirms composer Kōhei Tanaka and mentions soundtrack releases (Welcome to the Lennus World! MiniDisc with 10 tracks, and Lennus: Memory of the Ancient Machine Original Album with 10 tracks including arranged medleys and dramatic dialogue). However, specific tempo, key, chord progression, time signature, mode, energy level, melodic character, loop points, and SFX characteristics per area are not documented in available sources. TCRF source contained only navigation/disclaimer content with no game documentation. Data tier T3 (qualitative) cannot be fulfilled without specific musical analysis documentation.
